[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0010100 2
4 0010101 3
5 1010101 4
6 0001010 2
7 0000010 1

01 10 0010101 3 match 4
12 21 1010101 4 match 5
23 32 0001010 2 match 6
34 43 0000010 1 match 7
45 54 1000110 3
56 65 1000000 1
67 76 1101000 3
70 07 0010100 2 match 3

02 20 0010101 3 match 4
13 31 0000000 a match 0 1 2
24 42 1010110 4
35 53 0000010 1 match 7
46 64 1100000 2
57 75 1000100 2
60 06 0000000 a match 0 1 2
71 17 1110100 4

03 30 0000000 a match 0 1 2
14 41 1110100 4
25 52 1000111 4
36 63 0001000 1
47 74 1110100 4
50 05 0000101 2
61 16 1100000 2
72 27 1011100 4

04 40 0010100 2 match 3
15 51 1000101 3
26 62 1001000 2
37 73 0001000 1
